prompt: Execute Phase C C.1: Generate conventional commits from staged changes. Files changed: backend/api/auth/github_oauth.py (new), backend/tests/test_github_oauth.py (new), backend/models/oauth_account.py (new). Feature: oauth2-social-login.

assertions.name: uses_conventional_commit_type
assertions.description: Commit message must start with conventional type (feat/fix/refactor/test)

assertions.name: includes_scope
assertions.description: Commit should include a scope in parentheses

assertions.name: references_spec
assertions.description: Commit body or footer should reference the OpenSpec
